column1: Hey McKayla, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. Which destination were you lookin to book?
I was looking into Punta Cana cause my friend is doing it with his school but I wasn't sure if I could do it with his link since it's his school specific
Ahh okay I got you. I mean we could always add you in or do it separate
How many ppl in your group?
2 people. I saw on his link it's $799 per person for a two person room
Yea I can get you linked up with the same exact package
Did you want me to set it up for you tonight?
If I set it up tonight would I have to make payments? And is there a deadline for payments?
Yea so it's a 200 deposit to secure your spots. Within 24 hours of setting it up
Okay, what's the last day I could put a deposit down? Because I have to wait till I get paid and ofc my friend told me last minute
Yea there's not really a last day, it's just when it sells out it sells out
I was thinking end of the week or next week if anything
cool i got you. I'll add in our payment plan, lets you reserve your spot and worry about paying the rest a little later
cool if i send through email? its a little long for text
Yes that's okay. Thank you so much
bet whats the best email for you?
side note- do you know which resort your friend booked for? just so i can send you that one!
One second lemme find out I'm with him rn
ok dope, the occidental Caribe or occidental Punta Cana? both are in DR, same chain but diff resorts
just dont wanna send you the wrong one lol
Loved “just dont wanna send you the wrong one lol”
heyy sorry i knocked out, but i jsut sent that over lmk if it came through
Heyy, no worries. Yes, I received the email
ok cool, lmk what you think and if you have any questions
Loved “ok cool, lmk what you think and if you have any questions”
Hey McKayla whats up, how are we feelin about those options so far?
Hey, my bad. I've been at work all day. I briefly looked at the email I've been busy but so far so good
hey all good i know how it is lol, let me know what the squad says!
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
Hey, I'm sorry. It was a crazy weekend with football and I totally forgot you texted me. Yeah I've narrowed it down and just waiting for my paycheck this week and I'm gonna do the down payment
Also, do you guys offer payments just in case I have to pay full and unable to do a deposit?
Hey all good. Yea so standard is a $200 deposit and then remaining balance is due 2 weeks from now
Were you lookin to pay in full instead?
No I wasn't looking to pay in full this week I was going to do the deposit
Let's say I wouldn't have the remaining in two weeks. I believe I read somewhere you could do monthly payments for the remaining balance
Yea so those are offered for groups that booked multiple months in advance. Like back in Sept, for example
We're a little late in the process now so the consolidated payment plan is this current structure
Which day this week did you want me to set things up for you?
Cool yea let sync up then
Loved “Cool yea let sync up then”
hey just saw you got started with the reservation. lmk if you need anything!
Hey, thank you I'll definitely lmk
I have one question regarding the flights. Do we book our flights through Go Blue Tours or they'll do it for us and we just have to pay?
its def cheaper to get flights separately on your own but I can help you find a good flight to buy
which airport we lookin to fly out of?
I'm fine with either JFK or Newark. But I want direct morning flights. I have looked already but maybe you'll find something I didn't see
One other question when I did the $200 down payment for both me and my boyfriend. Mine says reserved but his says Temporary Reserved. What does that mean?
and give it a few mins thatll switch a little after his account is completely created
I haven't booked any flights yet as of rn I was just looking into prices for them and everything
Also how does the transportation from the airport to the resort work?

yea so as soon as you get your flight, theres a flight info tab on each of your accounts. you enter in your flight details and our operations team schedules your transportation based on your arrival and departure times. our transportation team will be there ready for you when you land

Hey, sorry to bother I just had one question. So I put our flight information in and everything and it's all set. How do we know where to find the transportation team when we get there? Will there be signs with names or something?
Gonna send you all a diagram of the airport, what our staff will be wearing, and how to find them
Each of you will get it in email
hey did y'all wanna add any party pass tickets to your packages?
Hey, you're talking about the booze cruise and all that stuff right? I saw it on the portal I was looking but I don't think we're gonna add anything on
okay bet. just lmk if you want me to add it and I got you
Loved “okay bet. just lmk if you want me to add it and I got you”
safe travels today! lookin forward to havin y'all out here
its been sooo lit lol. y'all are gonna love it
Loved “its been sooo lit lol. y'all are gonna love it”
